parsed_output.justification: Mitchell makes several contradictory claims about his role, stating he was the Robber and is now the Revealer, while simultaneously claiming that Justin is also the Revealer. Furthermore, both Justin and Julie express suspicion toward Mitchell and indicate their intent to vote for him, making him the most likely candidate for a Werewolf.
